message:
fix(classes,python,tests): remove duplicate edge_keys, unify should_run with can_run, update tests

- Remove duplicate `edge_keys` method in MultiGraph (already defined above
  with Iterator return type), resolving compilation conflict
- Change `BackendInterface.should_run` to delegate to `can_run` instead of
  checking `_SUPPORTED_ALGORITHMS` directly, ensuring consistent behavior
- Update test_coverage_gaps to test both `can_run` and `should_run`, using
  idiomatic bool assertions instead of `is True`/`is False`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -993,15 +993,23 @@ def test_backend_can_run_rejects_incompatible_signatures(self):
 
         graph = fnx.path_graph(4)
 
-        assert BackendInterface.can_run("shortest_path", (graph,), {}) is True
-        assert BackendInterface.can_run("node_connectivity", (graph, 0, 3), {}) is False
+        assert BackendInterface.can_run("shortest_path", (graph,), {})
+        assert not BackendInterface.can_run("node_connectivity", (graph, 0, 3), {})
         assert (
-            BackendInterface.can_run(
+            not BackendInterface.can_run(
+                "average_shortest_path_length",
+                (graph,),
+                {"method": "dijkstra"},
+            )
+        )
+        assert BackendInterface.should_run("shortest_path", (graph,), {})
+        assert not BackendInterface.should_run("node_connectivity", (graph, 0, 3), {})
+        assert (
+            not BackendInterface.should_run(
                 "average_shortest_path_length",
                 (graph,),
                 {"method": "dijkstra"},
             )
-            is False
         )
 
     @needs_nx
